fields.name: Golden Retriever
fields.description: A loving and energetic Golden Retriever with a sweet temperament. Great with families and ideal for both companionship and active lifestyles. Loyal, intelligent, and affectionate, making them one of the most popular family pets.

fields.name: Belt
fields.description: Keep your small furry friend safe and comfortable with this durable dog belt. Designed for small breeds, it features an adjustable strap for a snug fit, soft padding for comfort, and a sturdy buckle for security during walks or travel.

fields.name: Cat Food
fields.description: Give your feline friend the nutrition they deserve with our Premium Cat Food-specially formulated to support overall health, energy, and vitality. Made with high-quality ingredients and essential nutrients, this food provides a perfectly balanced diet that satisfies even the pickiest eaters.

fields.name: Dog Food
fields.description: Fresh meals made from meat, rice, and vegetables.

fields.name: Dog Toy
fields.description: Soft and comforting, ideal for light play or cuddling
